perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing glasses and a flat cap stands in a studio, speaking directly to the camera with tech boxes behind him. (2) Close-up shots of vibrant red wireless earbuds (CMF Buds Pro 2) inside and outside their case are shown, focusing on the mechanical rotating dial on the case. (3) A smartphone screen displays a software interface showing audio settings and EQ levels. (4) The scene transitions to the man holding and demonstrating a round-faced smartwatch (CMF Watch Pro 2) with a silver bezel. (5) Detailed close-ups show the watch bezel being popped off and replaced, as well as the strap being swapped. (6) The video concludes with a demonstration of the watch receiving a phone call interface.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic, upbeat electronic background music begins. A male voice with a friendly, professional tone starts speaking in Mandarin about a high-value brand. (2) The narration remains fast-paced and enthusiastic, detailing the features and pricing of the earbuds. (3) The background music continues at a steady volume while the narrator switches to explaining the features of a smartwatch. (4) Subtle sound effects like clicks or UI pings might be present during product close-ups, though the narration and BGM dominate. (5) The audio ends with the narrator highlighting the phone call functionality of the watch.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '有一個CP值破天際的' (There is a CP value breaking the sky). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Nothing 的子品牌 叫CMF' (Nothing's sub-brand called CMF). (3) Functional Text: '超高性價比的降噪耳機 CMF的 Buds Pro 2' (Ultra-high cost-performance noise-canceling headphones CMF Buds Pro 2). (4) Hook Text: '不到2000塊就可以買到!' (Available for less than 2000!). (5) Functional Text: '續航12小時' (12-hour battery life). (6) Functional Text: '自訂EQ語音降噪' (Custom EQ and voice noise reduction). (7) Functional Text: 'CMF Watch Pro 2 的智慧錶' (CMF Watch Pro 2 Smartwatch). (8) Hook Text: '最誇張的是這手錶的續航 誇張到11天之久' (The most exaggerated thing is the battery life, up to 11 days).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product A Demo (Earbuds) -> Product B Demo (Watch) -> Feature Highlights

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male host (Tim) appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male host wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, and a black sweatshirt with a white graphic print.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean indoor studio with wooden shelving, tech boxes (CMF, Nothing), and acoustic panels.
visual_scene_and_style.colorTone: Natural and clean with pops of red from the product.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut between narration segments, music fades at the very end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Feature Demonstration -> Price Benefit -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote and review the CMF by Nothing product line (Buds Pro 2 and Watch Pro 2) by highlighting their high performance-to-price ratio and unique physical customization features to a tech-savvy audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct showcase of products, pricing information, and listing of specific brand features.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host's signature flat cap and the '3ctim' social media handle watermark in the top left corner.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses high-paced editing and bright colors to maintain viewer engagement in a short-form video format.
